message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam linetype ortho
skinparam class {
  BackgroundColor white
  BorderColor black
  ArrowColor black
  FontName Arial
  FontSize 10
}
skinparam stereotypeCBackgroundColor #F0F0F0
skinparam stereotypeCBorderColor #CCCCCC

class "ClassificationRelation" as ClassificationRelation {
  relationType string 1..1
}

class "ClassificationProperty" as ClassificationProperty {
  activationDateUtc dateTime 1..1
  code string 1..1
  countryOfOrigin string 0..1
  countryOfUse string 0..*
  creatorLanguageCode string 0..1
  dataType string 0..1
  deActivationDateUtc dateTime 0..1
  definition string 0..1
  deprecationExplanation string 0..1
  description string 0..1
  dimension string 0..1
  dimensionAmountOfSubstance int 0..1
  dimensionElectricCurrent int 0..1
  dimensionLength int 0..1
  dimensionLuminousIntensity int 0..1
  dimensionMass int 0..1
  dimensionThermodynamicTemperature int 0..1
  dimensionTime int 0..1
  documentReference string 0..1
  dynamicParameterPropertyCode string 0..*
  example string 0..1
  isDynamic boolean 1..1
  isRequired boolean 0..1
  isWritable boolean 0..1
  maxExclusive decimal 0..1
  maxInclusive decimal 0..1
  methodOfMeasurement string 0..1
  minExclusive decimal 0..1
  minInclusive decimal 0..1
  name string 1..1
  pattern string 0..1
  physicalQuantity string 0..1
  predefinedValue string 0..1
  propertySet string 0..1
  propertyValueKind PropertyValueKind 0..1
  replacedObjectCode string 0..*
  replacingObjectCode string 0..*
  revisionDateUtc dateTime 0..1
  revisionNumber int 0..1
  status string 1..1
  subdivisionOfUse string 0..*
  symbol string 0..1
  textFormat string 1..1
  uid string 0..*
  unit string 0..*
  versionDateUtc dateTime 0..1
  versionNumber int 0..1
  visualRepresentationUri iri 0..1
}

class "Classification" as Classification {
  activationDateUtc dateTime 1..1
  classificationType ClassificationType 0..1
  code string 1..1
  countryOfOrigin string 0..1
  countryOfUse string 0..*
  creatorLanguageCode string 0..1
  deActivationDateUtc dateTime 0..1
  definition string 0..1
  deprecationExplanation string 0..1
  documentReference string 0..1
  name string 1..1
  referenceCode string 0..1
  relatedEntityName string 0..*
  replacedObjectCode string 0..*
  replacingObjectCode string 0..*
  revisionDateUtc dateTime 0..1
  revisionNumber int 0..1
  status string 1..1
  subdivisionOfUse string 0..*
  synonym string 0..*
  uid string 0..1
  versionDateUtc dateTime 0..1
  versionNumber int 0..1
  visualRepresentationUri iri 0..1
}

class "Domain" as Domain {
  copyrightNotice string 0..1
  languageCode string 1..1
  lastUpdatedUtc dateTime 1..1
  license string 0..1
  licenseUrl string 0..1
  moreInfoUrl string 0..1
  name string 1..1
  releaseDate dateTime 0..1
  status string 0..1
  version string 1..1
}

class "Property" as Property {
  activationDateUtc dateTime 1..1
  code string 1..1
  connectedPropertyCode string 0..*
  countryOfOrigin string 0..1
  countryOfUse string 0..*
  creatorLanguageCode string 0..1
  dataType string 0..1
  deActivationDateUtc dateTime 0..1
  definition string 0..1
  deprecationExplanation string 0..1
  description string 0..1
  dimension string 0..1
  dimensionAmountOfSubstance int 0..1
  dimensionElectricCurrent int 0..1
  dimensionLength int 0..1
  dimensionLuminousIntensity int 0..1
  dimensionMass int 0..1
  dimensionThermodynamicTemperature int 0..1
  dimensionTime int 0..1
  documentReference string 0..1
  dynamicParameterPropertyCodes string 0..*
  example string 0..1
  isDynamic boolean 1..1
  maxExclusive decimal 0..1
  maxInclusive decimal 0..1
  methodOfMeasurement string 0..1
  minExclusive decimal 0..1
  minInclusive decimal 0..1
  name string 1..1
  pattern string 0..1
  physicalQuantity string 0..1
  propertyValueKind PropertyValueKind 0..1
  replacedObjectCodes string 0..*
  replacingObjectCodes string 0..*
  revisionDateUtc dateTime 0..1
  revisionNumber int 0..1
  status string 1..1
  subdivisionsOfUse string 0..*
  textFormat string 0..1
  uid string 0..*
  unit string 0..*
  versionDateUtc dateTime 0..1
  versionNumber int 0..1
  visualRepresentationUri iri 0..1
}

class "PropertyRelation" as PropertyRelation {
  relationType string 1..1
}

class "PropertyValue" as PropertyValue {
  bsdd:value string 1..1
  code string 0..1
  description string 0..1
  sortNumber int 0..1
}

class "Country" as Country {
  code string 1..1
  name string 1..1
}

class "Language" as Language {
  isocode string 1..1
  name string 1..1
}

class "ReferenceDocument" as ReferenceDocument {
  date dateTime 1..1
  name string 1..1
  title string 1..1
}

class "Unit" as Unit {
  code string 1..1
  name string 1..1
  symbol string 0..1
}

ClassificationRelation "0..*" -- "2..2" Classification : related relation
Classification "0..1" -- "0..*" Classification : parentClassification
Classification "0..1" -- "0..*" Classification : childClassification
Classification "1..1" -- "0..*" ClassificationProperty : classificationProperty
Classification "1..1" -- "0..*" Domain : domain classification
ClassificationProperty "0..*" -- "0..*" PropertyValue : allowedValue
Property "0..*" -- "0..*" PropertyValue : allowedValue
Property "0..*" -- "0..*" ClassificationProperty : classificationProperty property
PropertyRelation "0..*" -- "2..2" Property : related relation

@enduml
```
